_description: Gate 2 allowlist draft template — for owner review only. DO NOT populate production allowlists from this file until Gate 2 is explicitly approved.
_warning: This file is a planning template. No values here are active in n8n. Populating production allowlists requires explicit Gate 2 approval in a dedicated Claude Code session.

campaign_allowlist._instruction: Replace CAMPAIGN_ID_PLACEHOLDER with real Instantly.ai campaign IDs. Start with 1-2 campaigns maximum.
campaign_allowlist._do_not_add: Any campaign you have not reviewed in shadow testing

sender_allowlist._instruction: Replace with real sender email addresses from your Instantly.ai workspace. Start with 1-3 senders.
sender_allowlist._do_not_add: Any sender domain you do not fully control

intent_allowlist._instruction: List micro-intent values the controlled pilot may act on. Start conservative.

configuration_settings._instruction: These values are for Gate 2 planning only. Do not apply until Gate 2 approved.
